name: Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
Farmers Market, The Land, EPCOT
TRY THIS ON DOUGH CYCLE IN BM.
In a large bowl, combine 2 cups flour with sugar, salt and yeast. Mix well. Gradually add water and butter; mix until a soft dough forms. Combine cheese in a separate bowl and reserve 1 cup. Add remaining cheese mixture, egg and 1 cup flour to dough; mix again and turn out onto a floured board. Knead for 8-10 minutes and add as much of the remaining flour as the dough will incorporate. Place in a lightly greased bowl, turning once to coat dough, and let rest 20 minutes. Knead again and divide into 4 equal pieces. Let rest 15 minutes; roll each piece into a rectangle. Roll dough jelly roll style, sealing bottom seam, and place on a lightly greased baking sheet or in loaf pans. Allow dough to rise in a warm place 50 minutes or until doubled. Cut a 1/4 inch deep slit in the top of each loaf and sprinkle an equal amount of remaining cheese on each. Bake at 375°F, 20-30 minutes or until golden. Remove from pans immediately and brush with butter.
